summary: Daniel combines court narratives and apocalyptic visions that reveal God’s sovereignty over empires and the eventual triumph of divine kingdom.
historical_context: Set during the Babylonian exile, the book presents faithful resistance within imperial power structures alongside prophetic visions of world history.

mirror_water_fire.mirror: Daniel reflects the tension between earthly empires and divine authority.
mirror_water_fire.water: Faithfulness purifies loyalty to God even within hostile systems.
mirror_water_fire.fire: Apocalyptic visions transform history into a stage for ultimate divine victory.
